task_description: Replace textual references to VP, Coins, Honor, Bushi, and Shinto in card effect translations with icon tokens that render inline SVG icons. Fix Piedad card text and rename deck.archway to Tori in Spanish.

verification.summary: npx tsc --noEmit passes cleanly. npm run build has pre-existing type errors in BattlePanel.tsx and BattleBiddingOverlay.tsx that exist on the original main branch and are unrelated to this change. No test framework exists in this project.
